sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, repeated_text VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, repeated_text) VALUES (1, repeat('B', 3));
UPDATE test_table SET repeated_text = repeat('C', 4) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, repeat(repeated_text, 2) AS double_repeated FROM test_table;
SELECT repeat('D', id) AS dynamic_repetition FROM test_table;
